channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Zara Larsson’s ‘Midnight Sun’ World & ‘Stateside’ Magic with PinkPantheress | Billboard Women In Music 2026
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the world of music and trending artists. Today, we're shining the spotlight on Zara Larsson, the Billboard Women in Music 2026 Breakthrough honoree. Zara's been making waves in the industry since she was just 14 years old, and now she's opening up about her journey and her latest era, Midnight Sun.
[Soft music transitions in]
Host: Zara, congratulations on being named Breakthrough of the Year. You've been in the industry for a while, but it sounds like this year has been particularly special for you. Can you tell us a bit about what's been going on?
[Zara Larsson's voice plays]
Zara Larsson: I'm living and breathing the Midnight Sun era, and it's been an incredible year for me personally and in my career. One of the highlights has been my collaboration with PinkPantheress on "Stateside". And of course, releasing Midnight Sun and seeing how people have reacted to it has been amazing.
Host: That's really cool. And it's not just the music itself, but the whole experience around it that's been engaging people. You've had fans dressing up, making videos to your songs, and coming to your shows.
Zara Larsson: Exactly. I feel like people are engaging so much more with my music now, and that's what it's all about for me - connecting with people. It's been incredible to see how it's all coming together.
[Soft music continues to play]
Host: Well, it's clear that Zara's hard work is paying off. And if you want to hear more from her, be sure to keep watching or listening for our next episode. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you next time.
[Outro music plays]
